title: lithocarpus papillifer
intro: Lithocarpus papillifer, also known as the Taiwan evergreen holly or Taiwanese holly, is a species of evergreen tree native to Taiwan. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. Lithocarpus papillifer has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as to promote digestion and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus papillifer include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make topical applications, such as salves and creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
